mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT g.id) FROM course c INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON c.id = ccl.course_id INNER JOIN "group" g ON ccl.class_id = g.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId}

SELECT DISTINCT g.id AS classId, g.name AS className FROM course c INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON c.id = ccl.course_id INNER JOIN "group" g ON ccl.class_id = g.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY g.id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM student s WHERE s.class_id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT g.id FROM course c INNER JOIN course_class_list ccl ON c.id = ccl.course_id INNER JOIN "group" g ON ccl.class_id = g.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} )

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FROM textbook t WHERE t.id IN ( -- 教师作为创建者的已发布教材 SELECT DISTINCT t.id FROM textbook t WHERE t.creator = (SELECT user_id FROM teacher WHERE id = #{teacherId}) AND t.release_status = 1
UNION
-- 教师作为协作者的已发布教材 SELECT DISTINCT t.id FROM textbook t INNER JOIN textbook_authority ta ON t.id = ta.textbook_id WHERE ta.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM teacher WHERE id = #{teacherId}) AND ta.authority_type = 1 AND t.release_status = 1 )
SELECT user_id FROM user_class_list WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND type = 1
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.identity_id FROM student s INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON s.user_id = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ll.reading_duration), 0) as total_reading_time FROM learning_log ll INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ll.creator = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1 AND ll.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ll.textbook_id) as total_reading_num FROM learning_log ll INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ll.creator = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1 AND ll.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_notes_num FROM learning_notes ln INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ln.creator = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1 AND ln.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tqb.id) as total_question_bank_num FROM teaching_question_bank tqb INNER JOIN student_exercises_record ser ON tqb.id = ser.teaching_question_bank_id INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON ser.student_id = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1 AND ser.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_communication_feedback_num FROM discussion_topic_reply dtr INNER JOIN user_class_list ucl ON dtr.creator = ucl.user_id WHERE ucl.class_id = #{classId} AND ucl.type = 1 AND dtr.add_datetime BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}

WITH ReaderCounts AS ( -- 1. 阅读人数 SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT creator) AS readerCount FROM learning_log GROUP BY textbook_id ), ReadingDurations AS ( -- 2. 阅读时长（分钟） SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(*) AS readingDurationMinutes FROM ( SELECT textbook_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator, textbook_id ORDER BY add_datetime), add_datetime)) as diff_seconds FROM learning_log ) AS durations WHERE diff_seconds BETWEEN 55 AND 65 GROUP BY textbook_id ), ActivityCounts AS ( -- 3. 教学活动数量 SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(*) AS teachingActivityCount FROM discussion_topic WHERE identity_type = 1 GROUP BY textbook_id ), FeedbackCounts AS ( -- 4. 交流反馈数量 SELECT t.id as textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) AS communicationFeedbackCount FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN discussion_topic dt ON t.id = dt.textbook_id LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY t.id ) -- 5. 组合并计算热度值 SELECT t.id AS "textbookId", t.textbook_name AS "textbookName", COALESCE(rc.readerCount, 0) AS "readerCount", COALESCE(rd.readingDurationMinutes, 0) AS "readingDurationMinutes", COALESCE(ac.teachingActivityCount, 0) AS "teachingActivityCount", COALESCE(fc.communicationFeedbackCount, 0) AS "communicationFeedbackCount", ( COALESCE(rc.readerCount, 0) * 10 + COALESCE(rd.readingDurationMinutes, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(ac.teachingActivityCount, 0) * 5 + COALESCE(fc.communicationFeedbackCount, 0) * 3 ) AS "popularityScore" FROM textbook t INNER JOIN ( -- 教师作为作者的教材 SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbook_id FROM textbook t WHERE t.creator = (SELECT user_id FROM teacher WHERE id = #{teacherId}) AND t.release_status = 1
UNION
-- 教师作为协作者的教材 SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbook_id FROM textbook t INNER JOIN textbook_authority ta ON t.id = ta.textbook_id WHERE ta.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM teacher WHERE id = #{teacherId}) AND ta.authority_type = 1 AND t.release_status = 1 ) teacher_textbooks ON t.id = teacher_textbooks.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ReaderCounts rc ON t.id = rc.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ReadingDurations rd ON t.id = rd.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ActivityCounts ac ON t.id = ac.textbook_id LEFT JOIN FeedbackCounts fc ON t.id = fc.textbook_id ORDER BY "popularityScore" DESC

WITH ReaderCounts AS ( -- 1. 阅读人数 SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(DISTINCT creator) AS readerCount FROM learning_log GROUP BY textbook_id ), ReadingDurations AS ( -- 2. 阅读时长（分钟） SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(*) AS readingDurationMinutes FROM ( SELECT textbook_id, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM age(LEAD(add_datetime, 1) OVER (PARTITION BY creator, textbook_id ORDER BY add_datetime), add_datetime)) as diff_seconds FROM learning_log ) AS durations WHERE diff_seconds BETWEEN 55 AND 65 GROUP BY textbook_id ), ActivityCounts AS ( -- 3. 教学活动数量 SELECT textbook_id, COUNT(*) AS teachingActivityCount FROM discussion_topic WHERE identity_type = 1 GROUP BY textbook_id ), FeedbackCounts AS ( -- 4. 交流反馈数量 SELECT t.id as textbook_id, COUNT(dtr.id) AS communicationFeedbackCount FROM textbook t LEFT JOIN discussion_topic dt ON t.id = dt.textbook_id LEFT JOIN discussion_topic_reply dtr ON dt.id = dtr.topic_id GROUP BY t.id ) -- 5. 组合并计算热度值 SELECT t.id AS "textbookId", t.textbook_name AS "textbookName", COALESCE(rc.readerCount, 0) AS "readerCount", COALESCE(rd.readingDurationMinutes, 0) AS "readingDurationMinutes", COALESCE(ac.teachingActivityCount, 0) AS "teachingActivityCount", COALESCE(fc.communicationFeedbackCount, 0) AS "communicationFeedbackCount", ( COALESCE(rc.readerCount, 0) * 10 + COALESCE(rd.readingDurationMinutes, 0) * 2 + COALESCE(ac.teachingActivityCount, 0) * 5 + COALESCE(fc.communicationFeedbackCount, 0) * 3 ) AS "popularityScore" FROM textbook t INNER JOIN ( -- 教师作为作者的教材 SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbook_id FROM textbook t WHERE t.creator = (SELECT user_id FROM teacher WHERE id = #{teacherId}) AND t.release_status = 1
UNION
-- 教师作为协作者的教材 SELECT DISTINCT t.id as textbook_id FROM textbook t INNER JOIN textbook_authority ta ON t.id = ta.textbook_id WHERE ta.user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM teacher WHERE id = #{teacherId}) AND ta.authority_type = 1 AND t.release_status = 1 ) teacher_textbooks ON t.id = teacher_textbooks.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ReaderCounts rc ON t.id = rc.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ReadingDurations rd ON t.id = rd.textbook_id LEFT JOIN ActivityCounts ac ON t.id = ac.textbook_id LEFT JOIN FeedbackCounts fc ON t.id = fc.textbook_id ORDER BY "popularityScore" DESC
